overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia running through a snowy mountain landscape during twilight. The third-person camera follows the character as he ascends a snow-covered slope with his signature twin swords visible on his back, surrounded by rocky outcrops and distant peaks under a dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily uphill through deep snow with twin swords on his back, moving toward the mountain ridge

entered.detail: deep snow with visible footprints and trail marks
steep rocky terrain partially covered in snow and ice
snow-capped mountain ridge silhouetted against the dark sky
overcast dark blue sky with heavy cloud cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running through a vast snowy mountain landscape during twilight. The terrain is an open slope with deep snow underfoot and rocky outcrops visible to the right. The dark blue sky creates a cold, atmospheric setting as the character steadily ascends the mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field approaching mountain ridge

events.description: character adjusts trajectory slightly left while maintaining uphill momentum

agents.ego_description: continuing to run uphill through the snow, navigating toward higher ground with consistent pace

entered.detail: large boulder formation emerging from the snow on the left side

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues his ascent, the initial rocky mountainside falls behind while new rock formations appear on the left. The distant snowy peak shifts to the left of the frame as the character adjusts his path slightly. The terrain remains consistently covered in deep snow with the dark twilight sky maintaining the cold, isolated atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt ascends a vast, snowy mountain slope under a cold twilight sky. It begins with the character running through an open expanse of deep snow, with rocky outcrops framing the right side of the path. As he continues his steady climb, the initial rocky mountainside falls behind and the perspective shifts, bringing new rock formations into view on the left. The scene then evolves as the distant snowy peak drifts toward the left of the frame, maintaining a sense of isolation against the dark blue atmosphere. Finally, the camera tracks his adjusted path across the frozen terrain, keeping the desolate mountain peaks as a constant backdrop.
